steps.title: The dealer draws a card
steps.desc: The card stays hidden. The active player tries to guess it.

steps.title: First try — higher or lower?
steps.desc: The player says a number. The app replies "higher" or "lower".

steps.title: Second try — last chance
steps.descDrink: If missed, the player drinks the difference between their guess and the card.
steps.descSober: If missed, the player takes the difference as points between their guess and the card.

steps.descDrink: If someone finds it, the dealer drinks 2 sips and their streak resets.
steps.descSober: If someone finds it, the dealer takes 2 points and their streak resets.

steps.title: 3 safe rounds = dealer passes
steps.desc: If no one finds it in 3 rounds, the dealer passes the phone.

steps.title: Special rule: the quadruple
steps.descDrink: When all 4 cards of the same value are out, they flip and the dealer drinks 2 more.
steps.descSober: When all 4 cards of the same value are out, they flip and the dealer takes 2 more points.

pickDealer.title:
Choose who
 holds the phone
pickDealer.sub: The dealer draws and takes the consequences.

special.title:
All 4 {{card}}
 are out!
special.sub: The 4 cards flip on the bridge.
